---
title: "ouroboros.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\forge_staged\ouroboros.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.15
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.64
---

## Intent
The `ouroboros.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on Ouroboros, __init__, ingest_feedback, evolve_weights, synthesize_skill_gap. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via Ouroboros, __init__, ingest_feedback, evolve_weights, synthesize_skill_gap. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [datetime](file://datetime)

### Exports
- `Ouroboros`
- `__init__`
- `ingest_feedback`
- `evolve_weights`
- `synthesize_skill_gap`
